revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Collier%27s%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} ===Purpose=== This template facilitates the citation of articles from the Wikisource project ''[[s:Collier's New Encyclopedia (1921)|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]'' in the manner of {{tl|cite encyclopedia}}. ===Usage=== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''}} for articles on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] or :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''}} for articles not on [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]]. With this option the optional url=''url'' may be wanted: :{{cite Collier's|title=''Collier's article name''|url=''url''}} and with a specification of the optional author, display, vb or noicon: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=''Collier's article name''|display=displayed article name|author=author name|noicon=x|vb=x}} ===Examples=== ====Simple==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} ====With comment==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew}} A popular politician in the formative years of the United States. ====Using display==== The mechanics of Wikisource will sometimes require that a link have disambiguation information which is not part of the original title. The display parameter allows this information to be hidden for the purpose of the citation. For example: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|Monroe (Louisiana)|year=1921|display=Monroe, a city of Louisiana}} ====Using short==== Using short removes the location, publisher and editor. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|short=x}} ====Using noicon==== :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Jackson, Andrew|noicon=x}} ====Using vb==== If text is incorporated verbatim into an article, the vb parameter can be used to tack on a notice appropriate to the policy in [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism]]. :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} displays as: :{{cite Collier's|wstitle=Townsend, Charles Henry Tyler|vb=x}} ===Hidden categories=== This template contains several hidden categories to aid with maintenance. These can be found under: *[[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from Collier's Encyclopedia]] ===See also=== * {{tl|Collier's}} * {{tl|Collier's Poster}} * [[WP:Sister projects]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Collier's Cite}} }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Encyclopedia source templates]] [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
